Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Subject: Audio recording of earnings conference call for the quarter ended June 30, 2023 
 
In continuation of our letter dated August 3, 2023, and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of SEBI 
(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the audio recording of 
the earnings call held today on Tuesday, August 8, 2023, 05.00 PM IST is available on 
Company’s website at the below mentioned path:  
 
https://www.hikal.com/uploads/documents/HikalEarningsCallQ1FY24AudioRecording.mp3 
 
This is for your information and records. 
 
Thank you, 
 
Yours Sincerely, 
for HIKAL LIMITED 
 
 
 
 
Rajasekhar Reddy
